title: Senate fails to block US involvement in Iran war
shortDescription: The Senate failed to advance a war powers resolution to halt hostilities in Iran.

title: Trump holds Texas Senate endorsement over GOP primary runoff
shortDescription: President Donald Trump did not give a Texas endorsement, but said he wants the Senate primary to end soon. What did he say about Rep. James Talarico?

title: Trump says the US will cut all trade with Spain over Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump on March 3 said the United States would cut off all trade with Spain after the European country refused to let the U.S. military use its bases for missions linked to strikes on Iran.

title: Trump rates Iran war operation a ‘15’ out of 10
shortDescription: President Trump said that on a scale of 1 to 10, he grades the U.S. war effort against Iran a "15."

title: AG Pam Bondi subpoenaed on Epstein files by House Oversight Committee
shortDescription: The House Oversight Committee voted to subpoena Attorney General Pam Bondi over the Department of Justice's Epstein files release.

title: White House dodges Trump rash questions
shortDescription: White House won't elaborate on why Trump used preventative skin cream as questions arise over rash seen at Medal of Honor event.

title: White House says no plans for ground troops
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt told reporters there are no plans for U.S. ground troops in Iran but that the option is on the table.

title: Where was Fred Trump born? Not Germany, as the president indicated
shortDescription: President Donald Trump alluded to his father being born in Germany, as he has several times in the past. But his father was born in New York.

title: Crockett concedes to Talarico in bitter Texas Senate Dem primary
shortDescription: The race was called overnight, following confusion over polling close times that led the Texas Supreme Court to weigh in.

title: Texas election results: Here's how key primary races finished
shortDescription: Texas primary results could send smoke signals for November midterms.

title: MLB star wins GOP primary in Texas, likely heading for Congress
shortDescription: A three-time MLB All-Star, Mark Teixeira won the GOP primary for Texas' 21st district.

title: Kesha slams White House for using her song without permission
shortDescription: Kesha is criticizing the Trump administration after a TikTok from the White House features her 2010 song “Blow” with the caption "Lethality 🔥🦅."

title: Hegseth says Trump assassination plot foiled
shortDescription: The Iranian officer who led a group effort to assassinate President Trump was "hunted down and killed," according to Sec. Pete Hegseth.
